note: Branch forks (Erik ratified 2026-07-06, build). At a specified rank, an ability splits into two specializations — pick A xor B, the other locks permanently for that ability on that character. Real opportunity cost; feeds from SNG-010 branch-templates. Each fork: two paths, each a distinct rank-expression (grants/cannot) that REPLACES the linear rank. Authored by Aevi (PO). Only a curated set of abilities fork — most stay linear.

prism_sight.prompt: Prism Sight has deepened enough to specialize. Two ways to see:

deep_read.name: Deep Read
deep_read.grants: Read an object's layered history in light — the order of what happened to it, not just what it is. Stratigraphy of a thing.
deep_read.cannot: Needs stillness and minutes; a hostile or hurried scene forecloses it.

wide_read.name: Wide Read
wide_read.grants: Sweep a whole space at once — every seam, hollow, and hidden thing in a room resolves in one look.
wide_read.cannot: Breadth costs depth — you see that a thing is there, not its history; once per location per visit.

sonic_resonance.prompt: Sonic Resonance can be tuned toward force or toward finesse:

shatter.name: Shattering Note
shatter.grants: Drive resonance to failure — crack stone, shatter a seal, bring a structure down at its weak point.
shatter.cannot: Destructive, loud, uncontrolled once released; never subtle, never repairs.

sustain.name: Sustained Chord
sustain.grants: Hold a resonance steady and long — brace a failing structure, keep a mechanism cycling, carry a signal far.
sustain.cannot: Holding costs continuously; cannot break, only bear.

greenlore.prompt: The old recipes run two directions:

healer.name: The Mending Hand
healer.grants: Brews that stabilize the dying, clear deep affliction, and knit what should not knit. The healer's road.
healer.cannot: Never a weapon; the strongest mends exact a cost the GM names.

apothecary.name: The Bitter Cabinet
apothecary.grants: Read and craft the whole spectrum — sleep, clarity, palsy, worse. What heals and what harms share a shelf.
apothecary.cannot: Knowing is not permission the world grants freely; reputation follows the cabinet.

quiet_step.prompt: The unseen errand specializes toward solitude or company:

ghost.name: The Ghost Road
ghost.grants: Move through the most-watched places as if the watch blinked; once a day break line-of-sight and simply be gone.
ghost.cannot: Solitary — the Ghost Road carries only you; Precursor sensors don't blink.

shepherd.name: The Quiet Shepherd
shepherd.grants: Move a small group unseen using your reads — bring others through where only you could go.
shepherd.cannot: A group is louder than one; the more you carry the thinner the cover.

latticespeak.prompt: Fluency in the old tongue turns toward listening or toward command:

diplomat.name: The Long Parley
diplomat.grants: Negotiate a live remnant toward dormancy; talk a waking system back to sleep. The peacemaker's fluency.
diplomat.cannot: Parley is not control; a system can refuse, and refusing costs you standing with it.

operator.name: The Sure Hand
operator.grants: Ask a Precursor system to perform its function reliably, repeatably — make the old machinery WORK for you.
operator.cannot: Operating deepens the drift most of all; what you run, you answer for.
